sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for SNES port

special_mechanics.name: Fighter Craft Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls Fighting Thunder aircraft in vertically scrolling space. Aircraft maneuvers to engage enemies and avoid attacks.

special_mechanics.name: Co-operative Fire
special_mechanics.description: In cooperative play, both players can generate special projectiles by shooting the other player's craft to damage enemies.

special_mechanics.name: Death Shrapnel Projectiles
special_mechanics.description: When the player dies, the fighter's shrapnel becomes projectiles that damage enemies.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Raiden Trad is a vertical scrolling shooter, not a platformer. Standard player character physics (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) are not applicable to this shoot-em-up genre. Movement consists of aircraft maneuvering in 2D space with responsive directional controls. No detailed physics documentation available in provided sources.
